But I can walk you through what working together looks like." *Sell your heart out *- Full program details, success stories, transformation process. Let me break down what you're actually getting in the programme Pillar 1 - MINDSET : Racing Mind is the first module Personal 1-on-1 coaching calls throughout your season to rewire your approach and eliminate the frustration cycle you're stuck in. Pillar 2 - PREP ARATION: A complete pre-session routine and race weekend structure so you're fast from the out-lap instead of taking 20 minutes to get up to speed. 

Pillar 3 - FLOW : 6 comprehensive modules teaching you exactly how to get into flow state in free practice, qualifying, and races - the same mental state where your fastest laps happen effortlessly . Pillar 4 - FEEDBACK: Our exclusive In The Zone app on your phone works without signal at the track. Please find the script for the Push Call first. We will break down the 8 stages below. (If you need more assistance on this please jump on the next Sales Clinic which takes place every Wednesday 20:00 London time). ----------------------------------------- Stage 1: Intro the call. Stage 2: The Reverse Frame. Stage 3: The Detective. Stage 4: Pain amplification. Stage 5: Create Doubt. Stage 6: Wrap it up. Stage 7: Roadmap. Stage 8: The Push Pitch. Stage 9: Objection Handling. Stage 10: Tie Downs. Push Call (1st Call) Stage 1: Intro the call. Hey NAME, It’s (YOUR NAME), How are you? Great. You scheduled a call with me for about now, is it still a good time to chat? Fantastic. You were on my webinar training right, how did you find it? Great stuff. Well listen, thanks for your interest in booking a call to explore what I’ve got and see if it would be of value to you and would help you XYZ. 

This first call is to find out where you’re at in the business, where you’re stuck and what your goals are and what I’ve found to work best on these calls is to ask you a few questions, get to know your situations better and then I can start making some recommendations if I feel we can help. Sound good? Stage 2: The Reverse Frame. Awesome. And just a heads up, you don’t need to worry about being sold anything on this call. If I can speak opening, I only have the capacity to work with a handful of clients each month and I do have some specific criteria for who I can help. So even if we really hit it off, if It’s ok with you, we’ll jump off the line so I go over my notes from the call, I’ll share that with my team and then we’ll be back in touch. So whatever the outcome of this call, we’ll both have a chance to go away and think, and we can reconvene in the next few days. Sound ok? Stage 3: The Detective. Great stuff. That’s all sounding very exciting! I’d love to dive into a few things on your application form if you wouldn’t mind? You mentioned on the form that you’d like to be at $XX / month in 6 months' time. Awesome goal. - Have you ever hit that kind of figure before? - How did you come up with that number? - Why is it important to you? You put that you’re an 8/10 on being determined to make this work? What’s keeping you from a 10? Oh and by the way, not a question here, just a quick statement… I noticed on the ‘why should we work with you’ question, you said XYZ and I LOVE THAT. That’s exactly the kind of thing we’re looking for. Stage 4: Pain amplification. So what you tried so far, Have you joined any other programs to get this fixed? How did that go? Oh Ok, got you. So have you seen any results at all this year or has it been a constant struggle? 

So, what shifted recently to make this a priority? Why is it important to you? How is that affecting your finances? Is this affecting your health in any way? What are you going to do if you don't get this figured out? Why not just stay where you are? Surely you can't keep going like this, right? Stage 5: Create Doubt. “This all makes sense to me (NAME). You’re certainly not the first person to be struggling with all this. In fact, do you mind If I go off on a little tangent real quick, because it might be helpful for you to know a bit of what’s going on behind the scenes in our industry and why it’s so much harder right now, would that be helpful?” *Prepare 2-3 examples of other popular solution in the marketplace, point out their flaws and why they don’t work etc* Stage 6: Wrap it up. "NAME, I really appreciate you being so honest with me. So here's what I'm hearing..." You're feeling.... (Remind them of pain). You've tried... (Remind them of what hasn't worked). You need... (Remind them of their goal and biggest wants). "Is that right" WAIT FOR A YES "Well I can definitely help with this." INSERT A TESTIMONIAL HERE IF POSSIBLE - "In fact, you remind me of..." “Well look, I’d love to lay out a bit of a plan for you and how I can help you INSERT GOAL, 

but let me ask you first..." "If I can show you exactly how to fix these issues and help you achieve INSERT BIG RESULTS, How quickly are you wanting to get started on fixing this?" Stage 7: The road map. "Ok great. Well I can definitely help you here. Here's what we're going to do to get this solved. First We're going to... Then we're going to... Thirdly we're going to...” *You are NOT explaining your program/offer here. If your offer is the Vehicle, this section is the journey* “How does that sound to you?” WAIT FOR A YES “Awesome. Well I do have a program that I think is actually pretty perfect for you. Let me know if you'd like me to tell you about it?” WAIT FOR A YES I fully understand where you’re at and this is exactly what I help our private clients with, so I’m very familiar with your situation and feeling confident I could help. Where would you like to go from here, do you have any questions for me at this point? Answer those questions Stage 8: The PUSH Pitch “Awesome. Well I do have a program that I think is actually pretty perfect for you. Let me know if you'd like me to tell you about it?” WAIT FOR A YES “Awesome. Well look, we’ve covered A LOT so far today and I must admit, I’ve really enjoyed our chat so far.” “I’m very happy to run you through all of that. I can share with you what the offer is, how it works, what you get and of course how much it costs. But please just keep in mind that we won’t make a decision on it today, ok? Even if it sounds perfect and we both think it’s a great fit, I’ve got quite a lot of calls booked for the rest of the week and I can’t work with everyone, so I just need to speak to everyone else first, if that’s ok?” “Awesome, then we can just have an open and candid conversation about it all. There’s quite a lot involved in being a private client, so I’m going to go rapid-fire, are you ready to take notes?” 

 *Break down the entire offer and make it sound super exciting* “How does that all sound to you on a scale of 1-10?" *Gauge their interest - Work them to a 10/10* Stage 9: Objection Handling. Awesome. Well look, this does actually sound quite exciting. This is exactly what my Elite program deals with. Pause to ‘think/mumble’ (For only a couple of seconds). Ok great well look, I’ve taken a bunch of notes from this call and I feel I have a good understanding of your situation so let me just take a day or so to get with my thoughts, and relay all this to my team and I’ll get back to you very soon. By the way, do you have any questions for me at this point? Happy to provide any clarity where I can. *QUESTION 1* *QUESTION 2* *QUESTION 3* If they have questions/objections. Answer them and handle them. No problem. *Keep pointing them back to what you learned about the during 'The Detective’* If it’s TRULY the money that’s the problem, offer your payment plans. Keep checking in and getting a scale of 1-10 Great stuff, well listen it’s been awesome speaking with you, I really like the sound of all of this. I have a few more calls this week with prospects, so I’d like to speak to everyone first before I decide who I’d like to work with. Is there anything you feel you’ve missed that I can add to my notes before we head off? Stage 10: Tie Downs. Oh actually, I suppose there is 1 more thing I should add to my notes here… If we do end up talking about coaching together, would you be looking to pay in full for YOUR PROGRAM? Would you need to chop it up a little? *SHARE PAYMENT OPTIONS* 

 Great stuff, well listen I look forward to speaking again. *book follow-up call*. Oh and am I right to assume that you’d be wanting to get started working on this pretty quickly? Is there anything that would stop you from being able to move forward? Great, well I look forward to speaking to you on DATE. *EXTRA TIP: Set them homework* Pull Close (2nd Call) Hey NAME Nice to speak to you again, how have you been feeling since our last call? *Good? - move on.* *Are they worried, not sure or fear has crept in? - work on that FIRST before officially offering them a spot.* Well listen I’ve had a good think and i’ve spoken to the team and I have some good news and bad news. Before I get into that, would you mind if I quickly recap our last call to make sure we’re both on the same page? Recap #1 - Their situation Recap #2 - Their desire to join the program Recap #3 - The result they want Is that all still pretty spot on? I just wanted to clarify a couple of quick things if that's ok? *Ask a couple of questions that continue to qualify them. Questions that only continue to build desire for your program and instil confidence in the prospect towards us.* Options/Examples… 

- You mentioned that you’re charging $2,000 now, but you’re keen to increase that price once you get some momentum, is that right? - I really hope this doesn’t come across offensively, but we just wanted to make sure of something… I only like to work with people who are committed to taking action really quickly and sometimes prospects tell us they will but then they go a little silent on us when in the program and start procrastinating and that’s obviously no good for anyone, right. So I just wanted to check that you’re definitely committed to taking action quickly so we can get you to INSERT THEIR GOAL. - You mentioned that you’ve tried a few things before to achieve XYZ, right? Sometimes clients can join our program with some lingering bad habits and instead of following our instructions to the letter, they veer off track a bit. We have a process that works incredibly well but it must be implemented exactly as we show, so I just want to make sure you’re happy with that and willing to come in and follow our process to a T? - I really like the sound of your offer and think you’d actually make a great testimonial for us. So we just wanted to check that you’d be ok with us sharing your success story on our website once we get you to INSERT THEIR GOAL? Love it, thanks for that, that’s really helpful. So, I have this good news and bad news to share with you, which one would you like first? GOOD NEWS: Look, I loved your application and my notes on your situation. Particularly SPECIFIC THING 1 and SPECIFIC THING 2 *pause* So I’m very keen to have you in the program and would like to offer you a spot. Congratulations, we’re looking forward to working with you on this. BAD NEWS: I’m afraid you’re going to be stuck with the AdClients family for the next 6 months! How are you feeling? Excited, nervous or a mix of the 2? I’m not surprised, it’s a big deal jumping into a program like this. You’re making a great decision and we’re going to take good care of you. CLOSE: You mentioned on our first call that you’d prefer the X payment option. So I’ve gone ahead and got loaded up for you. So when you’re ready, I’ll just grab the long number on the front of your card you’d like to use. TAKE PAYMENT. OBJECTION HANDLING: 

Handle objections as you usually would. Couple of extras below… Prospect: “I still need to think about it.” - Ask what’s changed since the first call? If it's the logistics of moving money around etc, take the $500 deposit. Explain that it’s company policy! IF it MUST go to a 3rd call, set it up in such a way that there is no way they can stall it further for a 4th. - So it’s just X, that you need to figure out? There’s no other reason that could prevent you joining? - What would you like me to add to my notes to share with my team because they were expecting to be welcoming you today.
